# Third-party Dataset Licenses

This repository does not redistribute third-party datasets.

## VisDrone-DET2019

VisDrone-DET2019 is used for UAV small-object detection evaluation. Users must download the dataset from the official VisDrone source and follow its original license and usage terms.

## ABC Dataset

The ABC CAD dataset is used for polygonal surface reconstruction and completion-related evaluation. Users must download the dataset from the official ABC source and follow its original license and usage terms.

## Repository Policy

This repository provides only:
- download instructions,
- preprocessing notes,
- compact split references,
- configuration files,
- derived non-sensitive summaries.

No third-party raw images, annotations, CAD files, or full datasets are redistributed.
